title: 50pcs Small Keyrings Split Rings, 0.47inch/12mm Black Jump Rings Metal Mini Key Ring Stainless Steel Ring for Keychain Earring Crafts Making DIY
features: Ymapinc's small key rings split rings feature 0.47inch/1.2cm diameter stainless steel construction with sleek black finish, ensuring durability and corrosion resistance for long-lasting use in keychain and jewelry applications

These 12mm black jump rings provide secure attachment for keys, charms, and accessories with their precision-engineered metal split key ring design that maintains strong hold while allowing easy opening and closing

Ideal for DIY crafts making, these mini key rings offer versatile functionality for earring creation, jewelry repair, keychain assembly, and various creative projects with professional-grade reliability
The stainless steel key ring set includes 50pcs of 0.47*0.47*0.08inch rings with 15g net weight, providing ample supply for multiple projects while maintaining consistent quality across all pieces

Perfect for craft enthusiasts and professionals alike, these black jump rings come in protective packaging measuring 15*10.5*1.9cm, ensuring safe delivery and organized storage for your crafting needs
